Serialized Form

  • Package <Unnamed>

    • Class Coordinate

      class Coordinate extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • latitude
          double latitude
          Latitude of the coordinate.
        • longitude
          double longitude
          Longitude of the coordinate.

    • Class Hospital

      class Hospital extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentCapacity
          int currentCapacity
          Current number of admitted patients.
        • id
          String id
          Unique hospital identifier.
        • maxCapacity
          int maxCapacity
          Maximum number of patients that can be admitted.
        • name
          String name
          Hospital display name.
        • position
          Coordinate position
          Geographic position of the hospital.
        • services
          Set<HospitalServiceType> services
          Set of medical services provided by the hospital.

    • Class MapManager

      class MapManager extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • hospitals
          Map<String,Hospital> hospitals
          Hospitals indexed by their unique identifier for O(1) look-up.
        • patients
          Map<String,Patient> patients
          Patients indexed by their unique identifier for O(1) look-up.

    • Class Patient

      class Patient extends Person implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • requiredService
          HospitalServiceType requiredService
          Medical service required by the patient.

    • Class Person

      class Person extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • id
          String id
          Unique identifier that distinguishes this person from all others in the system. Declared protected so that subclasses can read it directly in overridden toString methods without going through a getter.
        • name
          String name
          Human-readable display name shown in the graphical interface and console output.
        • position
          Coordinate position
          Current geographic position of this person on the dispatch map.
